title: Guard Policy
description: Policy file for ActionFence — defines what AI agents are allowed to do.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

service.description: Name of the service this policy belongs to.

default_rule.description: Default behavior for actions not listed in 'actions'. Defaults to 'deny' when omitted.

actions.description: Map of action names to their permission rules.

identity.description: Minimum identity tier required. Defaults to 'any' if omitted.

max_spend.description: Maximum spend amount allowed for this action in major units.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for max_spend, such as USD.

requires_human_approval.description: Whether human approval is required before execution.

schema_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the tool input schema, set via npx actionfence pin-schemas

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum requests per minute per agent. Set to 0 for unlimited.

transactions_per_day.description: Maximum transactions per day per agent. Set to 0 for unlimited.

session_max.description: Maximum projected session spend per agent in major units.

daily_max.description: Maximum projected UTC-day spend per agent in major units.

window.description: Rolling-window spend cap. Blocks when cumulative spend within duration_minutes exceeds max_amount.

max_amount.description: Maximum spend allowed within the rolling window in major units.

duration_minutes.description: Duration of the rolling window in minutes.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for spend reporting.

session_timeout_minutes.description: Idle timeout in minutes after which sessionTotal resets to 0. When omitted and session_max is configured, defaults to 60 minutes. Set to 0 to disable idle-timeout resets.

circuit_breaker.description: Global circuit breaker — a master kill-switch that blocks all agents when cumulative spend exceeds a hard ceiling.

global_max_spend.description: Hard ceiling for cumulative global spend in major units (e.g., 10000 = $10,000).

action.description: Behavior when the breaker trips. 'block_all' denies every call; 'alert_only' logs a warning but allows.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for display purposes.

regulations.description: Regulatory frameworks (stored only, not enforced in v1).
